records.m_Talk_ENG:
*Huff*
8v *Huff
8v*
records.m_Talk_DEU:
*Huff*
8v *Huff
8v*
records.m_Talk_FRA:
*Huff*
8v *Huff
8v*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even after months of training, you're still stuck in place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even after months of training, you're still stuck in place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even after months of training, you're still stuck in place.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I
8v can still
8v do this.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I
8v can still
8v do this.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I
8v can still
8v do this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Strength used to swing blindly with no purpose is like a sword with no hilt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Strength used to swing blindly with no purpose is like a sword with no hilt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Strength used to swing blindly with no purpose is like a sword with no hilt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'll never master the Sword of Paramita that way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'll never master the Sword of Paramita that way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'll never master the Sword of Paramita that way.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Even so
8v I'll master it.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Even so
8v I'll master it.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Even so
8v I'll master it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then tell me. What is the true reason you need that power?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then tell me. What is the true reason you need that power?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then tell me. What is the true reason you need that power?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it revenge against the Beast? Or to uphold some noble cause and protect the world?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it revenge against the Beast? Or to uphold some noble cause and protect the world?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it revenge against the Beast? Or to uphold some noble cause and protect the world?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A mere cloud, which couldn't even reach me before, now dares to quell my storm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A mere cloud, which couldn't even reach me before, now dares to quell my storm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A mere cloud, which couldn't even reach me before, now dares to quell my storm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you mean that your Sword of Paramita gets stronger when you abandon your physical body?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you mean that your Sword of Paramita gets stronger when you abandon your physical body?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you mean that your Sword of Paramita gets stronger when you abandon your physical body?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've only ever manipulated the resentments of others. No wonder you don't understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've only ever manipulated the resentments of others. No wonder you don't understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've only ever manipulated the resentments of others. No wonder you don't understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just how fearsome a woman's grudge spanning thousands of years can be, now that she is unbound.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just how fearsome a woman's grudge spanning thousands of years can be, now that she is unbound.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just how fearsome a woman's grudge spanning thousands of years can be, now that she is unbound.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vAbsurd. No matter what, still just a mere human.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vAbsurd. No matter what, still just a mere human.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vAbsurd. No matter what, still just a mere human.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander Myeongdal. The time is ripe. I'm going in for the final strike.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander Myeongdal. The time is ripe. I'm going in for the final strike.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander Myeongdal. The time is ripe. I'm going in for the final strike.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. I'll clear the way, so don't hesitate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. I'll clear the way, so don't hesitate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. I'll clear the way, so don't hesitate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reason... I took up the sword is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reason... I took up the sword is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reason... I took up the sword is...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
To protect
8v the one I love.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
To protect
8v the one I love.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
To protect
8v the one I love.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sword of Paramita, Tigerbane.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sword of Paramita, Tigerbane.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sword of Paramita, Tigerbane.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
There is no self in anything, and all phenomena come to an end.
8Y

There is no self in anything, and all phenomena come to an end.
8Y
